_comment: Accepted, intentional divergences between data/resumeData.ts (web, canonical) and resume-pdf/resume.typ (PDF subset). Regenerate with: npm run resume:drift:accept. If the underlying text changes, the fingerprint won't match and the gate re-trips. Add a "note" to any entry to document why it diverges.

exp:0:summary.web: Tech lead for Fire TV Catalog Enrichment, previously client-side tech lead on Fire TV Partner Integrations. Promoted to Sr. Software Engineer (Q4 2022).
exp:0:summary.pdf: Tech lead for Catalog Enrichment, previously client-side tech lead on Partner Integrations. Promoted to Sr. Software Engineer (Q4 2022).
exp:0:summary.note: PDF drops the two redundant 'Fire TV' mentions (company line above already says Amazon, Fire TV) so the lead fits one line; needed for the one-page budget with the Summary section.

exp:1:summary.web: Led cloud modernization initiatives for Global Top 10 insurance client, migrating legacy enterprise systems to AWS serverless and containerized architectures. Promoted to Senior Consultant (Q3 2019).
exp:1:summary.pdf: Led cloud modernization initiatives for Global Top 10 insurance client. Promoted to Senior Consultant (Q3 2019).
exp:1:summary.note: PDF keeps the one-line lead for the one-page budget; the AWS keywords appear in the Insurance Cloud Modernization stack and bullet.
